title: Furry Fables Multi-functional Interactive Dog Toy Set, Plush Flower Pot Treat Dispenser with Squeaky Strawberries and Tug Rope, Pet Training and Play, Snuffle Toy, Tug Toy
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Plush flower pot treat dispenser combined with squeaky strawberries and rustling leaves for varied play experiences
SOFT ROPE FEATURE: Stretchy fabric rope perfect for gentle tug-of-war play, suitable for dogs with different bite strengths
MULTIPLE TEXTURES: Three squeaky strawberries and two rustling leaves provide engaging sounds and sensory stimulation during play
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Double-layered fabric flower pot with reinforced banding ensures long-lasting durability for active play
TRAINING TOOL: Treat dispenser pot encourages problem-solving and rewards nosework, making playtime both fun and mentally stimulating
FRIENDLY REMINDER: No toy is indestructable. Supervised play is recommended. Please remove once the toy is damaged or torn.
description: Product description Delight your furry friend with this engaging interactive dog toy set that combines multiple play experiences in one. The centrepiece is a sturdy double-layered fabric flower pot that doubles as a clever treat dispenser, perfect for challenging nosework activities. The set includes three adorable squeaky strawberries and two rustling leaves, all connected by a soft, stretchy fabric rope that's ideal for gentle tug-of-war play. The specially designed fabric rope is soft yet durable, making it suitable for dogs of varying strengths and dental conditions. Each strawberry produces an enticing squeaky sound, while the leaves create an intriguing rustling effect, providing both auditory and visual stimulation. The flower pot features a strong banding entrance that makes treat-finding more challenging and engaging for your pet. This versatile toy set encourages physical activity, mental stimulation, and bonding time between you and your dog. The combination of different textures, sounds, and play styles helps keep your pet entertained and engaged for longer periods. Directions NOT for aggressive chewers, please keep damaged or torn toy away from your pet
